info.title: Event Catalog
info.description: OpenAPI specification for Auth0 Event Catalog

specversion.description: The version of the CloudEvents specification which the event uses.

type.description: The type of the event which has happened.

source.description: The source of the event. This will take the form 'urn:auth0:<tenant>.<domain>'.

id.description: A unique identifier for the event.

time.description: An ISO-8601 timestamp indicating when the event physically occurred.

id.description: The unique identifier for the group.

external_id.description: The external identifier for the group.

created_at.description: Date and time when this entity was created (ISO_8601 format).

type.description: The type of the group.

connection_id.description: The connection ID associated with the group.

oneOf.description: Represents a connection group entity.

id.description: The unique identifier for the group.

external_id.description: The external identifier for the group.

created_at.description: Date and time when this entity was created (ISO_8601 format).

type.description: The type of the group.

organization_id.description: The organization ID associated with the group.

oneOf.description: Represents an organization group entity.

id.description: The unique identifier for the group.

external_id.description: The external identifier for the group.

created_at.description: Date and time when this entity was created (ISO_8601 format).

type.description: The type of the group.

oneOf.description: Represents a tenant group entity.

context.description:
Information about the context in which the event was produced. This may include things like
HTTP request details, client information, connection information, etc.

Note: This field may not be present on all events, depending on the event type and the
context in which it was generated.

client.description: The OAuth Client requesting or presenting an access token.

strategy.description: The auth strategy implemented by the connection.

connection.description: The Auth0 Connection used for the authentication transaction that generated the event.

geo.description: Geographic information about the request origin.

hostname.description: The hostname the request is for.

custom_domain.description: The custom domain used in the request (if any).

ip.description: The originating IP address of the request.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

tenant.description: Reference to a tenant in event context

a0tenant.description: The auth0 tenant ID to which the event is associated.

a0stream.description: The auth0 event stream ID of the stream the event was delivered on.

group.created.description: Represents an event that occurs when a group is created.

name.description: The human-readable identifier for the organization that will be used by end-users to direct them to their organization in your application..

assign_membership_on_login.description:
When true, all users that log in with this connection will be automatically granted membership
in the organization. When false, users must be granted membership in the organization before
logging in with this connection.

show_as_button.description:
Determines whether a connection should be displayed on this organization’s login prompt.
Only applicable for enterprise connections.

is_signup_enabled.description:
Determines whether organization signup should be enabled for this organization connection.
Only applicable for database connections.

id.description: A unique identifier for the event.

time.description: An ISO-8601 timestamp indicating when the event physically occurred.

user_id.description: ID of the user which can be used when interacting with other APIs.

email_verified.description: Whether this email address is verified (true) or unverified (false).

phone_verified.description: Whether this phone number has been verified (true) or not (false).

created_at.description: Date and time when this entity was created (ISO_8601 format).

updated_at.description: Date and time when this entity was last updated/modified (ISO_8601 format).

connection.description: Name of the connection containing this identity.

user_id.description: The IDP-specific identifer for the user.

email_verified.description: Whether this email address is verified (true) or unverified (false).

given_name.description: Given name/first name/forename of this user.

family_name.description: Family name/last name/surname of this user.

phone_verified.description: Whether this phone number has been verified (true) or not (false).

items.description: Identity object when accounts are linked.

identities.description: Array of user identity objects when accounts are linked.

app_metadata.description: User metadata to which this user has read-only access.

user_metadata.description: User metadata to which this user has read/write access.

picture.description: URL to picture, photo, or avatar of this user.

nickname.description: Preferred nickname or alias of this user.

multifactor.description: List of multi-factor authentication providers with which this user has enrolled.

last_ip.description: Last IP address from which this user logged in.

last_login.description: Last date and time this user logged in (ISO_8601 format).

logins_count.description: Total number of logins this user has performed.

blocked.description: Whether this user was blocked by an administrator (true) or is not (false).

given_name.description: Given name/first name/forename of this user.

family_name.description: Family name/last name/surname of this user.

context.description:
Information about the context in which the event was produced. This may include things like
HTTP request details, client information, connection information, etc.

Note: This field may not be present on all events, depending on the event type and the
context in which it was generated.

client.description: The OAuth Client requesting or presenting an access token.

strategy.description: The auth strategy implemented by the connection.

connection.description: The Auth0 Connection used for the authentication transaction that generated the event.

geo.description: Geographic information about the request origin.

hostname.description: The hostname the request is for.

custom_domain.description: The custom domain used in the request (if any).

ip.description: The originating IP address of the request.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

tenant.description: Reference to a tenant in event context

a0tenant.description: The auth0 tenant ID to which the event is associated.

a0stream.description: The auth0 event stream ID of the stream the event was delivered on.

user.created.description: Represents an event that occurs when a user is created.
